data.title: Possibly due to the difficulty of Warsh gaining Senate confirmation, Polymarket estimates the probability of Powell stepping down as Fed chair after his term expires to be only 2%.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, although Jerome Powell's term as Fed chairman ends on May 15, Polymarket estimates the probability of him stepping down as chairman after his term expires (May 14). Powell is expected to continue serving as interim chairman. The key to whether Powell can continue as Fed chairman after his term expires lies in whether Trump's chosen successor, Kevin Warsh, can be confirmed by Congress at his Senate Banking Committee hearing on April 21. Powell previously stated that if a successor is not confirmed before May, he will serve as interim chairman. Therefore, the market is indirectly betting that Warsh will struggle to gain congressional approval before April 21 or even May 15, because North Carolina Republican Senator Thom Tillis is blocking the appointment, stating that he will not proceed with any Fed nominee until the Justice Department terminates its investigation into Powell. Odaily Seer continues to monitor and predict the market, seeing changes before they are priced in.

data.title: MGBX will launch spot trading of Sentio (ST).
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will list Sentio (ST) spot trading on April 18, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Deposits will open on April 16, 2026 at 16:00 (SGT), trading will open on April 16, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT), and withdrawals will open on April 18, 2026 at 19:00 (SGT). Sentio is a decentralized data and computing network built specifically for crypto developers. It provides a modern development toolchain, including the Sentio Processor (managed subgraph) supporting native TypeScript, multi-language SDKs, decentralized computing infrastructure, and high-performance data indexing and analysis.

data.title: Circle Commends KRWQ Stablecoin Integration with USDC
data.description: Circle has expressed approval for KRWQ, a won-pegged stablecoin developed through a collaboration between IQ and Frax Finance. According to NS3.AI, Circle highlighted the integration of KRWQ with USDC, noting its potential to tackle inefficiencies in the offshore Korean won non-deliverable forward market. The initiative aims to establish a more transparent on-chain foreign exchange framework.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF Surpasses WisdomTree in Net Inflows
data.description: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF has achieved a significant milestone, reaching $103 million in total net inflows. According to NS3.AI, this development places it ahead of WisdomTree's ETF, which has garnered $86 million in net inflows. On April 15, Morgan Stanley's ETF added $19.3 million in net inflows, marking a notable achievement just one week after its launch.

data.title: Gulf States Utilize Malaysia as Channel to Iran, Says Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim
data.description: Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has revealed that leaders from Gulf states have been using Malaysia as a conduit to engage with Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Anwar's statement about the diplomatic role Malaysia plays in facilitating communication between these regions. This development underscores Malaysia's strategic position in fostering dialogue and cooperation in the Middle East. Anwar's comments reflect the ongoing geopolitical dynamics and the importance of diplomatic channels in addressing regional issues.

data.title: Nvidia CEO Highlights China's AI Capabilities Amid Security Concerns
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has stated that China possesses sufficient computational resources to develop an AI model on par with Mythos. According to NS3.AI, Huang noted that China is responsible for producing 60% of the world's mainstream chips and has significant unused data center capacity. Meanwhile, Anthropic and the AI Security Institute have raised concerns that Mythos-level AI systems could potentially be exploited for cyberattacks.

data.title: Lido DAO Reaches 10-Week High Amid Network Growth
data.description: Lido DAO's token price surged to a 10-week high of $0.39, trading around $0.38, marking an approximate 10% increase within 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, Santiment reported that the token experienced significant network growth, with 141 new wallets added in a single day, the highest increase in two months.

data.title: Binance Futures will launch pre-market trading of CHIPUSDT USDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: Binance will launch pre-market trading of CHIPUSDT perpetual contracts on April 16, 2026 at 15:15 (UTC+8), with a maximum leverage of 5x.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank Expected to Raise Interest Rates Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
On April 16, a Reuters survey revealed that nearly two-thirds of economists predict Japan's central bank will increase its benchmark interest rate to 1% by the end of June. According to BlockBeats, the ongoing uncertainty from the Iran conflict has led the market to believe that a rate hike could occur either this month or in June.

Economists generally anticipate that Japan's central bank will tighten its policy again this quarter, a view that has remained largely unchanged since the U.S. and Israel initiated military action against Iran on February 28. The conflict has heightened concerns over rising energy prices, renewed inflation pressures, and further weakening of the yen, reinforcing expectations for a hawkish rate hike.

In a survey conducted from April 7 to 14, 46 out of 71 economists (65%) forecasted that the policy rate would rise to 1% by the end of June, up from 60% in March and 58% in February. Among the 40 economists who specified a timing, 38% chose April, while 35% opted for June. In last month's survey, the highest support was for a June rate hike at 32%, followed by July at 30%, and April at 27%.

Looking beyond June, the median forecast indicates that Japan's central bank will raise borrowing costs to 1.25% in the fourth quarter, slightly earlier than previously expected. The median forecast also suggests a further 25 basis point increase to 1.50% in the third quarter of 2027, with rates remaining steady until the end of the year. However, a few institutions anticipate a rise to 1.75%.

data.title: UK Manufacturing Output Declines in February
data.description: The United Kingdom's manufacturing output for February showed a year-on-year decrease of 0.5%, according to Jin10. This decline was larger than the anticipated drop of 0.3% and follows a previous increase of 1.3%. The data highlights challenges faced by the manufacturing sector amid ongoing economic uncertainties.

data.title: UK Construction Output Rises 1% in February, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: The UK's construction output increased by 1% in February, surpassing the anticipated 0% growth, according to Jin10. The previous month's figure was revised from 0.20% to 0.5%, indicating a stronger performance than initially reported. This data reflects a positive trend in the construction sector, suggesting resilience despite broader economic challenges.

data.title: BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF Rebounds with $59.31 Billion in Holdings
data.description: BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF has experienced a significant recovery, now holding $59.31 billion worth of Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Arkham monitoring indicates that the ETF's holdings reached their lowest point on February 25th but have since rebounded by over $11 billion.

data.title: Global Crypto Regulation Faces Fragmentation Challenges, Says CertiK Co-Founder
data.description:
CertiK co-founder Gu Ronghui participated in two roundtable forums during the 2026 Paris Blockchain Week, discussing the current state of global crypto regulation and industry development. According to Foresight News, Gu highlighted that while global crypto regulation is gradually advancing, it remains highly fragmented. The significant differences in regional policies and unclear compliance terms pose challenges for businesses.

Gu noted that global crypto regulation has entered a phase of regional exploration, yet there are three core gaps in risk awareness, incident detection, and enforcement response among regulatory bodies. He revealed that some projects have suffered multi-million dollar losses due to hacker attacks, which local regulators failed to detect in time, indicating a lack of understanding of both on-chain and off-chain risks.

In terms of regional progress, Gu mentioned that Hong Kong has issued its first batch of stablecoin licenses, and Brazil plans to launch a comprehensive compliance framework in October, accelerating the pace of regulatory advancement. Meanwhile, regulatory policies in the UAE and Singapore have recently tightened. Looking ahead, Gu expects the proportion of on-chain finance to continue increasing, necessitating the simultaneous improvement of security and compliance infrastructure in the industry.

data.title: Analysis: The ETH/BTC exchange rate rose to a 10-week high, with Ethereum recently outperforming Bitcoin.
data.description: The ETH/BTC exchange rate has risen to a 10-week high, with Ethereum recently outperforming Bitcoin. The ratio has broken through the downtrend line resistance since August 2025 and is above the 50-day and 100-day exponential moving averages. XWIN Research points out that the SEC's employee statement released on April 13th explained that DeFi front-ends and wallet interfaces do not need to register as broker-dealers if they meet conditions such as non-custodial and neutral fee structures, which has driven Ethereum's strength. On-chain data shows an upward trend in active addresses, and the Coinbase premium gap is also improving, indicating that institutional demand in the US is recovering. Enterprise-level accumulation is accelerating; Bitmine has added 279,000 ETH in the past 30 days and currently holds 4.87 million ETH, representing more than 4% of the circulating supply. In the futures market, global ETH open interest reached $16.37 billion, with funding rates remaining negative, indicating that short sellers dominate. However, open interest on Binance increased by 10.47% to $6.04 billion, and funding rates turned positive, creating an extreme imbalance between global short sellers and Binance long sellers.

data.title: BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF holds $59.31 billion worth of Bitcoin, with an average holding price of $89,000.
data.description: According to Arkham data, the BlackRock Bitcoin ETF holds $59.31 billion worth of Bitcoin at an average price of $89,000. The BlackRock Bitcoin ETF's holdings bottomed out on February 25th and have since rebounded by over $11 billion.

data.title: Jupiter Litterbox Trust Increases JUP Holdings
data.description: Jupiter Litterbox Trust has recently expanded its holdings by acquiring an additional 379,115 JUP tokens. According to Foresight News, this purchase is part of a larger acquisition strategy this month, bringing the total to 6,779,248 JUP tokens. The trust's cumulative purchases now amount to 110,882,499 JUP tokens.

data.title: Bitcoin's Bull Run Faces Resistance at $75,000
data.description:
Bitcoin has experienced a 10% increase this month, yet its upward momentum has encountered a significant barrier at the $75,000 mark over the last two days. According to CoinDesk, the cryptocurrency's rally has slowed, raising questions about its ability to maintain its recent gains. Analysts suggest that the resistance level is proving challenging for Bitcoin, as market dynamics and investor sentiment play crucial roles in its price movement.

The cryptocurrency market has been closely monitoring Bitcoin's performance, with many investors hoping for a breakthrough past the $75,000 threshold. However, the current stall indicates that Bitcoin may need additional catalysts to push beyond this level. Factors such as regulatory developments, macroeconomic conditions, and technological advancements could influence Bitcoin's trajectory in the coming days. As the market continues to evolve, stakeholders are keenly observing any shifts that might impact Bitcoin's price stability and future growth potential.

data.title: Japan's Rate Hike Expectations Decline Amid Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description: On April 16, according to Jin10, Daiwa Securities economists noted that due to geopolitical uncertainties, market expectations for an immediate rate hike by the Bank of Japan have decreased. This shift makes it easier for the Bank of Japan to justify maintaining its current interest rates. Currently, the overnight index swap market estimates a 26% probability of a rate hike by the Bank of Japan in April, down from approximately 60% last week. Japan's economy has shown some resilience against the adverse effects of deteriorating trade conditions. The current monetary policy is at a stage where a comprehensive assessment is required, with careful consideration of potential inflation trends and external shocks.

data.title: Blockstream CEO Advocates for Quantum-Resistant Bitcoin Upgrades
data.description:
The CEO of Blockstream has emphasized the importance of implementing quantum-resistant upgrades for Bitcoin during the Paris Blockchain Week. According to CoinDesk, this statement comes shortly after Jameson Lopp suggested an alternative approach of freezing coins that may be susceptible to quantum computing threats.

The discussion around quantum resistance in Bitcoin has gained traction as advancements in quantum computing pose potential risks to the security of cryptocurrencies. The Blockstream CEO's call for proactive measures highlights the urgency of addressing these vulnerabilities before they can be exploited. This perspective contrasts with Lopp's proposal, which focuses on mitigating risks by freezing at-risk coins, suggesting a more reactive strategy. The debate underscores the broader concern within the crypto community about safeguarding digital assets against emerging technological threats. As the conversation continues, stakeholders are considering various strategies to ensure the long-term security and resilience of Bitcoin in the face of evolving computational capabilities.

data.title: Dogecoin Surpasses $0.095 Amid Positioning-Driven Rally
data.description: Dogecoin experienced a notable increase in value, rising from $0.093 to $0.098, surpassing the $0.095 mark and outperforming Bitcoin and Ether during the trading session. According to NS3.AI, the volume strengthened during this upward movement, although daily active addresses showed a downward trend. The rally was characterized as positioning-driven rather than demand-led, indicating strategic maneuvers by traders rather than a surge in market demand.
